about_me:
Hello, I'm Taha, a 16-year-old software engineer. Ever since I was young, I've had a passion for technology and programming. I love the challenge of solving complex problems and creating innovative solutions.

I started my journey in software engineering when I was just 10 years old. I began by learning the basics of programming, and over the years, I've continued to build my skills and knowledge. I've worked on a variety of projects, from small web applications to large-scale software systems.

services.name: Software development
services.desc: I can develop custom software solutions for clients, ranging from small web applications to large-scale enterprise systems.

services.name: Technical writing
services.desc: I can write documentation for software systems, including user manuals, technical specifications, and API documentation. This can be a valuable service for clients who need to make their software more accessible to users or other developers.

services.name: Consulting
services.desc: I can offer consulting services to clients who need help with their existing software systems. This can include services such as code review, performance optimization, security analysis, and architecture design.

services.name: Training and coaching
services.desc: I can offer training and coaching services to help others learn software development skills. This can include services such as one-on-one coaching, group training sessions, or online courses.

blog.title: زبان های مفسری vs زبان های کامپایلری
چه فریمورکی برای فرانت اند یاد بگیرم؟
